steps.title: Spot the documentation method
steps.content: The passage states: “To document this period, Wilkerson narrates the personal journeys of Ida Mae Gladney and Robert Pershing Foster, among others.” This is her documentation approach.

steps.title: Identify the choice that emphasizes this approach
steps.content:
B directly makes this method its central point by stating that she “chronicles the complex history of the Great Migration... by narrating the journeys of individuals, such as Ida Mae Gladney and Robert Pershing Foster.” The other choices either focus on awards unrelated to documentation (A), profile one person without explaining her broader method (C), or describe the Great Migration's scope rather than her documentation strategy (D).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
